headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on PNC Financial Services Gr, Lowers Price Target to $263
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Betsy Graseck   maintains PNC Financial Services Gr (NYSE:PNC) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $283 to $263.

headline: Is PNC Well-Positioned to Sustain Its Capital Return Strategy?
summary: PNC Financial supports steady dividends and buybacks with strong liquidity and disciplined payouts, signaling confidence in sustaining capital returns.

headline: John McDonald Lowers PNC Price Target, Notes Macro and Structural Headwinds
summary: The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE:PNC) is included among the 14 Safest Stocks with Highest Dividends. On March 26, Truist analyst John McDonald lowered the firm’s price recommendation on The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE:PNC) to $234 from $240. It maintained a Hold rating on the shares.
